notes:
### New
- **In-app What's New** — see friendly, AI-generated release notes right inside the app after each update.
- **Skills & History explorer** — browse Skills and session History in the sidebar, with state kept per session.
- **Paste images into chat** — paste screenshots and clipboard images straight into a session as attachments.
- **Drag-and-drop attachments** — a drop overlay appears while you drag files over a session so you can attach them in place.
- **Menu pages in the main area** — open References, Marketplace, Help, and your Org context as full pages.

### Improved
- **Tab indicators** — clearer unread and attention markers on tabs and sessions so you can tell what needs you.
- **Chronological transcript** — chat now reads top-to-bottom with related tool runs grouped together.
- **Skills panel** — rebuilt with source and provider filters to find the right skill faster.
- **Quickstart redesign** — refreshed create-workspace, marketplace, and template detail screens.
- **Plan mode** — a "Keep chatting" interrupt, tab-scoped controls, and cleaner status chips.
- **Titlebar breadcrumb** — the titlebar now shows which menu page you have open.
- **Empty states** — illustrated placeholders for Files, Changes, and Skills when there's nothing to show.
- **Native macOS look** — tinted glass styling and tab hover animations aligned with sessions.
- **Polished "working" labels** — animated shimmer on working indicators, plus refreshed session rows, popovers, and icons.

Palette Desktop v0.16.0 brings a refreshed workspace experience with a new What's New panel, smarter file attachments, and a redesigned sidebar and quickstart flow.

### New

- **In-app What's New** — see friendly, automatically generated release notes right inside the app whenever you update.
- **Paste images directly** — paste screenshots and clipboard images straight into chat as attachments.
- **Drag-and-drop attachments** — drop files anywhere over a session and a clear overlay shows you exactly where they'll attach.
- **Skills + History tabs** — the sidebar explorer now includes dedicated Skills and History tabs that remember their state per session.

### Improved

- **Keep chatting while planning** — interrupt a plan to keep the conversation going, with tab-scoped controls and cleaner status chips.
- **Cleaner transcript** — chat now reads in a single chronological flow with related tool runs grouped together.
- **Skills panel** — rebuilt with source and provider filters so you can find the right skill faster.
- **References, Marketplace, Help & Org context** — these now open as full main-area pages instead of cramped popups.
- **Redesigned quickstart** — refreshed create-workspace, marketplace, and template detail screens.
- **Illustrated empty states** — Files, Changes, and Skills now show helpful illustrations when there's nothing to display yet.
- **Native macOS polish** — tinted glass effects and smoother, more consistent tab and session hover animations.
- **Visual refinements** — session rows, popovers, and icons tightened up across the app.
- **Animated status labels** — "working" labels now shimmer with a subtle shine while tasks run.
